title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 9 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 9 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 9 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore futures moved weakly today. The most-traded contract, I2609, closed at 760 yuan/mt,down 0.20% from the previous tradingday. Port spot prices remained largely unchanged from the prior day.
